description_long: This object is a small, stylized yacht with a predominantly red hull and a white superstructure, constructed from interlocking plastic bricks. The hull is boxy and angular, with a flat base and slightly raised sides, while the upper section features a slanted, white cabin with black and blue accents and a brown vertical element resembling an antenna or mast. The deck area is compact, with minimal detailing, and the overall design is blocky, with visible studs and seams typical of construction toys. The yacht sits on a light-colored rectangular base, suggesting it is a display model rather than a functional vessel. There are a few brown cylindrical elements on the deck, possibly representing vents or small equipment. The object is visually simple, with no visible windows, doors, or intricate features, and is clearly intended as a playful, abstract representation of a yacht.
description: A small, blocky red and white yacht model with a slanted cabin, brown and blue accents, and a flat display base. The design is simple and stylized, built from interlocking plastic bricks.
description_view_0: Front view shows the squared bow, red hull, and the white slanted cabin with a brown vertical element on top.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the slanted white cabin, blue accent, and the angular transition from hull to superstructure.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the cabin, brown cylindrical elements, and the flat stern of the red hull.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the slanted cabin, black and blue details, and the overall blocky profile of the yacht.
attribute_hull_design: The hull is a monohull configuration with a flat bottom and squared-off bow and stern, constructed from red plastic bricks. The sides are straight and vertical, with no visible chines, keels, or curvature. The hull is unadorned except for a thin black stripe near the base.
attribute_deck_layout: The deck is a single, flat level with minimal features, including a raised white cabin structure and a few brown cylindrical elements. There are no visible walkways, railings, or seating areas, and the deck space is compact and blocky.
attribute_cabin_structure: The cabin is a single, slanted white structure positioned centrally on the deck, with a black and blue accent on one side. There are no visible windows, doors, or additional cabins, and the exterior is smooth and angular.
